body.script: (function(){window._cf_chl_opt = {cvId: '3',cZone: 'redbox.poakpong.com',cType: 'managed',cRay: '9eb01bfd1908a354',cH: '8IKg_WFjx7kFSefzLxjpgvBO2z5Z5FnjtFQIonGc92s-1775974660-1.2.1.1-VTr3SdkPHicackDfiBBapR3tryEqdiUo4vPqn3zgYrPi2rY6Xo_DkXnuV0kZ90og',cUPMDTk:"/feedmix?__cf_chl_tk=kERA_izyRayWAvVDyLNUkd6nPxXk4RxgHwUcf3Pyo1k-1775974660-1.0.1.1-PWyKU9OuN8zrL1YsrosNGbbrM.LyHV1JUCSW25ea0mQ",cFPWv: 'g',cITimeS: '1775974660',cTplC:0,cTplO:0,cTplV:5,cTplB: '0',fa:"/feedmix?__cf_chl_f_tk=kERA_izyRayWAvVDyLNUkd6nPxXk4RxgHwUcf3Pyo1k-1775974660-1.0.1.1-PWyKU9OuN8zrL1YsrosNGbbrM.LyHV1JUCSW25ea0mQ",md: '_HQV60t_2VJw5Lrt4UllJzYWTwa.r5.nFIQ5MUifKqo-1775974660-1.2.1.1-N3LNFzdzrLuJs7pM5h9yB8svQTWzTunbzCoHmy8qsMRa5hJAzF36AEtLnG8MHNZ.gveNzCQc9ZjKOI2yfQk2RCzQal5YiIiN3eNuG15nHob.0GSz16FVUTh8RoQiHOAL0IBJksC2P.bT.guiBjeZLFOb4iqY0__WQ8WiRcvPaaZfBlnycRvzQsPsLnjVxx1guFlpffu9WsOkdVBX7KZsZo0mRUPxczYgz3kMlBQ.GmZJXIlmiv7iEZSVY7k0UwdKQENsPdqYZCF5EZUDcJCHsop7kkgbqEm2hlvpGGzYK_91vfZYbA.8EZNYGH0Vhf6YtgKokfvy2_iQViP6rVU0TfBbOv4qCBhbisXCf2yOq8zFRVfhcT1qKBjhoT0nm7YqXpEiIgZmuUZy0ZrClVBIwj6LX9Siwh2hTyNl1beNNo7RjbKNpool0_KAqrZQI9FW9Xh7apz2ghAefB3i1rwZaDiOsWKEsjZEylhK_apc503IBZrrX49Wo_z2TH3JbIVfeig5Wphz19JG1gnBBGcb2M5P03m1UnS9A',mdrd: 'fJ6hZm3q93pDEBGAPSnG2byZNoXEk02S.OplWU3LV9E-1775974660-1.2.1.1-KymNQYo1gp_aWk14AolGIU8hAckZl6m2O6StgiboXNOl4HnxJZ3Et0WlQcR4YUw_vHG6cb.44TlThl0F3tmWFyTEx968Qqchl2zl16bBNtzUa5WTEEPyuLr7IlZhJlpnO9cnKl49BuOPMwaccSutyqZVWmxtXMh.65iW4Ry5nDF4okcRDWWpsM1HlClrj9sjYQWRXojEoG2W_CdM0Rkq38aSSjw4ROBkdc2o8dHR0su6TGGZdmruD0ibuG7p0up.kguJyCpKuhDJkVNaCthZah5FSO7YFRs12VeBBIKW6uuEB7d7pjKLOYLgQw0ssohUJ4GJ1w0x3_lDtFx8JVdHNg',};var a = document.createElement('script');a.src = '/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/h/g/orchestrate/chl_page/v1?ray=9eb01bfd1908a354';window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash = location.hash === '' && location.href.indexOf('#') !== -1 ? '#' : location.hash;window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery = location.search === '' && location.href.slice(0, location.href.length - window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash.length).indexOf('?') !== -1 ? '?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/feedmix?__cf_chl_rt_tk=kERA_izyRayWAvVDyLNUkd6nPxXk4RxgHwUcf3Pyo1k-1775974660-1.0.1.1-PWyKU9OuN8zrL1YsrosNGbbrM.LyHV1JUCSW25ea0mQ"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
